utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: That is right , I love you ! And ... and I am gonna play with you all the time .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I love you ! And ... and I am gonna play with you all the time .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: How can you let him talk to your crotch like that ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_How can you let him talk to your crotch like that ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: He is talking to the baby .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , cause when ... when he said , " I can not wait to hear your first words , " I thought , " There is a trick . "

emotion_cause.span: 6_when ... when he said , " I can not wait to hear your first words , " I thought , " There is a trick . "

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay . Well , I gotta go you guys . I will see you later .
